description_long: This doll features a simple, geometric body with a T-shaped yellow torso and arms, and a cylindrical lower section forming the legs. The head is a large, round disc with a highly expressive face, including wide blue eyes and an open mouth, giving it a playful and animated appearance. The face is rendered with a photorealistic texture, contrasting with the smooth, matte yellow of the body. The arms extend horizontally, while the legs are short and parallel, suggesting a stylized, almost stick-figure-like design. The materials appear to be primarily plastic for the body and a printed or painted surface for the face. The overall construction is lightweight and minimal, suitable for use as a toy in urban play areas or parks.
description: A stylized yellow doll with a T-shaped body and a large, expressive face featuring wide eyes and an open mouth. The body is smooth and geometric, with a photorealistic face texture.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the doll, with the disc-shaped head and the straight, vertical body and legs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain, circular back of the head and the T-shaped yellow arms and torso, with no facial features visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the slim profile and the angled head with a hint of facial features.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full expressive face with wide eyes and an open mouth, and the T-shaped yellow body and arms.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll appears unclothed, with a smooth yellow body and no visible garments, patterns, or fashion accessories.
attribute_pose: The doll's arms are extended horizontally to the sides, forming a T-shape with the torso, while the legs are straight and parallel beneath the body. The head is upright and forward-facing.
attribute_facial_expression: The face displays a highly animated, surprised or excited expression with wide open blue eyes and a large open mouth.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is a smooth, round disc with a printed face.
